restaurant.name: Gourmet Burger
restaurant.tagline: Crafted with passion, served with love

menu.name: Vegan Burger
menu.description: A wholesome plant-based patty loaded with fresh greens, tomato, pickles, and our signature vegan sauce on a toasted sesame bun.

menu.name: Fish Burger
menu.description: Crispy golden fish fillet with creamy tartar sauce, fresh lettuce, and a soft brioche bun. Ocean fresh every day.

menu.name: Bacon Cheeseburger
menu.description: Juicy beef patty topped with crispy streaky bacon, melted cheddar cheese, caramelized onions, and smoky BBQ sauce.

menu.name: Margherita
menu.description: Classic Italian pizza with San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, and fragrant basil leaves.

menu.name: Pepperoni
menu.description: Loaded with premium pepperoni slices on a rich tomato base with stretchy mozzarella and Italian herbs.

menu.name: BBQ Chicken
menu.description: Smoky BBQ base topped with tender grilled chicken, red onion, peppers, and a drizzle of honey mustard.

menu.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
menu.description: Warm molten chocolate cake with a gooey dark chocolate centre, served with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.

menu.name: Cheesecake
menu.description: Velvety New York-style cheesecake on a buttery graham cracker crust topped with fresh strawberry compote.

menu.name: Ice Cream Sundae
menu.description: Three scoops of premium gelato with hot fudge, whipped cream, crushed nuts, and a maraschino cherry on top.
